description: 六级翻译真题原文与参考译文（2016~2025年）

2025年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 绿色能源是指可再生能源和清洁能源，包括太阳能、风能、水能、生物质能和地热能等。中国是世界上最大的绿色能源生产国和消费国，在风能、太阳能和水能领域居世界领先地位。中国的风电和光伏装机容量位居世界第一，海上风电发展迅速。绿色能源的发展对于减少化石能源依赖、降低碳排放、改善环境质量具有重要意义。中国提出了"能源革命"战略，大力推动能源生产和消费方式的转变。预计到2030年，中国非化石能源占一次能源消费的比重将达到25%左右。绿色能源的发展不仅推动了中国的能源结构优化，也为全球应对气候变化做出了重要贡献。
2025年6月第3套cet6.english: Green energy refers to renewable energy and clean energy, including solar energy, wind energy, hydropower, biomass energy and geothermal energy. China is the world's largest producer and consumer of green energy, leading the world in wind, solar and hydropower. China's installed capacity of wind power and photovoltaic power ranks first in the world, and offshore wind power is developing rapidly. The development of green energy is of great significance for reducing dependence on fossil energy, lowering carbon emissions, and improving environmental quality. China has proposed an "energy revolution" strategy, vigorously promoting the transformation of energy production and consumption patterns. It is estimated that by 2030, the proportion of non-fossil energy in China's primary energy consumption will reach about 25%. The development of green energy has not only promoted the optimization of China's energy structure, but also made important contributions to the global fight against climate change.

2025年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 低碳生活是一种以低能耗、低排放为特征的生活方式，旨在减少温室气体排放，应对气候变化。近年来，低碳生活的理念在中国越来越深入人心，越来越多的人开始践行绿色生活方式。在日常生活中，人们可以通过多种方式实现低碳生活：选择步行、骑自行车或乘坐公共交通出行；节约用电，使用节能电器；减少一次性塑料制品的使用；进行垃圾分类和回收利用。绿色消费也日益流行，人们更倾向于购买环保产品和本地生产的食品。政府也在积极推广低碳生活理念，建设低碳社区。低碳生活不仅是个人责任，也是全社会共同参与的行动，每个人都可以为保护地球家园贡献自己的力量。
2025年6月第2套cet6.english: Low-carbon living is a lifestyle characterized by low energy consumption and low emissions, aimed at reducing greenhouse gas emissions and addressing climate change. In recent years, the concept of low-carbon living has become increasingly popular in China, and more and more people are adopting green lifestyles. In daily life, people can achieve low-carbon living in various ways: choosing to walk, ride bicycles or take public transportation; saving electricity and using energy-efficient appliances; reducing the use of disposable plastic products; and sorting garbage for recycling. Green consumption is also becoming increasingly popular, with people preferring to buy environmentally friendly products and locally produced food. The government is also actively promoting the concept of low-carbon living and building low-carbon communities. Low-carbon living is not only a personal responsibility, but also an action involving the whole society. Everyone can contribute their efforts to protecting our planet.

2025年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 生态文明建设是中国特色社会主义事业的重要内容，关系人民福祉和民族未来。中国政府将生态文明建设纳入"五位一体"总体布局，坚持绿水青山就是金山银山的理念。近年来，中国在生态环境保护方面取得了显著成效：空气质量持续改善，森林覆盖率稳步提高，河流湖泊水质不断好转。中国积极推动绿色低碳发展，大力发展清洁能源，减少碳排放。中国还积极参与全球环境治理，承诺力争2030年前实现碳达峰、2060年前实现碳中和。生态文明建设正在推动中国走上生产发展、生活富裕、生态良好的文明发展道路。
2025年6月第1套cet6.english: Ecological civilization construction is an important part of the cause of socialism with Chinese characteristics, bearing on the well-being of the people and the future of the nation. The Chinese government has incorporated ecological civilization construction into the "Five-Sphere Integrated Plan" overall layout, adhering to the concept that lucid waters and lush mountains are invaluable assets. In recent years, China has achieved remarkable results in ecological and environmental protection: air quality has continued to improve, forest coverage has steadily increased, and the water quality of rivers and lakes has been constantly improving. China actively promotes green and low-carbon development, vigorously develops clean energy, and reduces carbon emissions. China also actively participates in global environmental governance, committing to peak carbon emissions by 2030 and achieve carbon neutrality by 2060. Ecological civilization construction is pushing China onto a civilized development path featuring production development, affluent living, and a sound ecological environment.

2024年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 瓷器是中国古代的伟大发明之一，被誉为中国文化的瑰宝。中国瓷器制作的历史可以追溯到东汉时期，经过几千年的发展，中国的瓷器工艺达到了极高的水平。中国瓷器种类繁多，有青瓷、白瓷、青花瓷、彩瓷等，各具特色。景德镇是中国著名的"瓷都"，以生产精美的瓷器而闻名世界。中国的瓷器不仅在国内广泛使用，还通过古代丝绸之路和海上丝绸之路远销海外，深受各国人民的喜爱。在英语中，"china"一词既指中国，也指瓷器，可见瓷器与中国文化的密切关系。
2024年6月第3套cet6.english: Porcelain is one of the great inventions of ancient China and is hailed as a treasure of Chinese culture. The history of Chinese porcelain production can be traced back to the Eastern Han Dynasty. After thousands of years of development, Chinese porcelain craftsmanship has reached an extremely high level. There are many varieties of Chinese porcelain, including celadon, white porcelain, blue-and-white porcelain and colored porcelain, each with its own characteristics. Jingdezhen is the famous "capital of porcelain" in China, known worldwide for producing exquisite porcelain. Chinese porcelain is not only widely used at home, but also sold overseas through the ancient Silk Road and the Maritime Silk Road, deeply loved by people from all over the world. In English, the word "china" refers both to the country and to porcelain, which shows the close relationship between porcelain and Chinese culture.

2024年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 丝绸是中国古代最重要的发明之一，对世界文明产生了深远的影响。中国养蚕缫丝的历史可以追溯到五千多年前。丝绸以其柔软光滑、色泽亮丽的特性而闻名，深受世界各国人民的喜爱。古代丝绸之路是连接中国与中亚、欧洲的重要贸易通道，丝绸是这条路上最具代表性的商品。中国的丝绸工艺精湛，苏州、杭州和成都等地以生产优质丝绸而闻名。丝绸不仅是一种纺织品，更是中国传统文化的重要载体，体现了中华民族的智慧和创造力。如今，丝绸仍然在国际市场上享有盛誉，是中国文化的一张亮丽名片。
2024年6月第2套cet6.english: Silk is one of the most important inventions of ancient China, which has had a profound impact on world civilization. The history of silkworm breeding and silk reeling in China can be traced back more than 5,000 years. Silk is known for its softness, smoothness and bright luster, and is deeply loved by people all over the world. The ancient Silk Road was an important trade route connecting China with Central Asia and Europe, and silk was the most representative commodity along this road. China's silk craftsmanship is exquisite, and cities such as Suzhou, Hangzhou and Chengdu are famous for producing high-quality silk. Silk is not only a textile product, but also an important carrier of traditional Chinese culture, reflecting the wisdom and creativity of the Chinese nation. Today, silk still enjoys a high reputation in the international market and is a shining name card of Chinese culture.

2024年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 中医是中国传统医学的简称，是中华民族在长期医疗实践中形成的独特医学体系。中医以阴阳五行学说为基础理论，强调人体是一个有机整体，讲求辨证论治。中医的治疗方法包括中药、针灸、推拿、拔罐和气功等多种手段。中医注重预防为主，提倡"治未病"的理念。近年来，中医在全球范围内受到越来越多的关注和认可。在抗击新冠疫情中，中医药发挥了重要作用，被纳入中国诊疗方案。中医不仅是中华民族的瑰宝，也是世界医学的重要组成部分，正在为人类健康做出更大贡献。
2024年6月第1套cet6.english: Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) is the abbreviation for traditional Chinese medicine, a unique medical system formed by the Chinese nation through long-term medical practice. TCM is based on the theory of yin-yang and the five elements, emphasizing that the human body is an organic whole and focusing on syndrome differentiation and treatment. The treatment methods of TCM include Chinese herbal medicine, acupuncture, massage, cupping and qigong, among others. TCM emphasizes prevention first and advocates the concept of "treating disease before it occurs". In recent years, TCM has received increasing attention and recognition worldwide. In the fight against the COVID-19 pandemic, traditional Chinese medicine played an important role and was incorporated into China's diagnosis and treatment protocols. TCM is not only a treasure of the Chinese nation, but also an important part of world medicine, making greater contributions to human health.

2024年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 智慧城市是运用物联网、大数据、云计算和人工智能等新一代信息技术，促进城市规划、建设和管理的智能化。中国许多城市正在积极推进智慧城市建设，以提高城市管理效率，改善居民生活质量。智慧交通系统可以实时监控交通流量，优化信号灯控制，缓解交通拥堵。智慧医疗让患者可以通过网络预约挂号、远程问诊，享受便捷的医疗服务。智慧政务使市民可以在线办理各种行政事务，减少了跑腿时间。中国在智慧城市建设方面走在了世界前列，多个城市被列为全球智慧城市建设的典范。智慧城市的建设正在让城市更智能、更宜居、更可持续。
2024年12月第3套cet6.english: A smart city uses new-generation information technologies such as the Internet of Things, big data, cloud computing and artificial intelligence to promote intelligent urban planning, construction and management. Many cities in China are actively promoting the construction of smart cities to improve urban management efficiency and enhance residents' quality of life. Smart transportation systems can monitor traffic flow in real time, optimize signal light control, and alleviate traffic congestion. Smart healthcare allows patients to make online appointments and remote consultations, enjoying convenient medical services. Smart government services enable citizens to handle various administrative affairs online, reducing the time spent on errands. China is at the forefront of the world in smart city construction, with multiple cities listed as models of global smart city development. The construction of smart cities is making cities smarter, more livable and more sustainable.

2024年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 数字支付是中国数字经济快速发展的一个缩影。从最初的网上银行到如今的移动支付、刷脸支付和数字货币，中国的支付方式经历了翻天覆地的变化。目前，中国数字支付普及率位居世界前列，城市居民几乎可以不用现金完成所有日常消费。数字人民币是由中国人民银行发行的法定数字货币，已经在多个城市进行试点应用。数字支付给人们的生活带来了极大的便利，同时也推动了电子商务、共享经济等新业态的蓬勃发展。中国政府正在不断完善数字支付监管体系，保障支付安全和用户权益，促进数字经济的健康可持续发展。
2024年12月第2套cet6.english: Digital payment is a microcosm of the rapid development of China's digital economy. From the initial online banking to today's mobile payment, face-scanning payment and digital currency, China's payment methods have undergone earth-shaking changes. At present, China's digital payment penetration rate ranks among the highest in the world, and urban residents can complete almost all daily consumption without using cash. The digital RMB is a legal digital currency issued by the People's Bank of China, and has been piloted in many cities. Digital payment has brought great convenience to people's lives, while also promoting the vigorous development of new business forms such as e-commerce and the sharing economy. The Chinese government is continuously improving the digital payment regulatory system to ensure payment security and protect users' rights, promoting the healthy and sustainable development of the digital economy.

2024年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 人工智能是当今世界科技发展的前沿领域，正在深刻改变人们的生产生活方式。中国高度重视人工智能的发展，将其列为国家战略重点领域。中国在人工智能领域取得了显著进展，在计算机视觉、自然语言处理和语音识别等方面达到世界先进水平。人工智能技术已广泛应用于中国的医疗诊断、智能交通、金融科技和教育等领域，提高了效率，改善了服务质量。然而，人工智能的发展也带来了数据隐私、就业结构变化等挑战。中国正在加强人工智能伦理规范和法律法规建设，促进人工智能健康有序发展，让科技更好地造福人类。
2024年12月第1套cet6.english: Artificial intelligence is a frontier field of global technological development today, profoundly changing people's ways of production and life. China attaches great importance to the development of artificial intelligence and has listed it as a key national strategic area. China has made remarkable progress in the field of artificial intelligence, reaching world-class levels in computer vision, natural language processing and speech recognition. AI technology has been widely applied in medical diagnosis, intelligent transportation, financial technology and education in China, improving efficiency and service quality. However, the development of AI has also brought challenges such as data privacy and changes in employment structure. China is strengthening ethical norms and laws and regulations for AI to promote the healthy and orderly development of artificial intelligence, so that technology can better benefit humanity.

2023年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 科技创新是推动国家发展的重要引擎。近年来，中国在科技创新领域取得了举世瞩目的成就。在航天领域，中国成功实施了嫦娥探月工程、天问火星探测任务，自主建造了天宫空间站。在信息技术领域，中国的5G技术领先世界，人工智能、大数据、云计算等新兴技术蓬勃发展。中国还大力加强基础科学研究，量子计算、生命科学等领域取得了一系列重大突破。这些成就的取得离不开国家对科技创新的高度重视和持续投入。未来，中国将继续坚持创新驱动发展战略，建设世界科技强国。
2023年6月第3套cet6.english: Scientific and technological innovation is an important engine driving national development. In recent years, China has made remarkable achievements in the field of scientific and technological innovation. In the aerospace field, China has successfully implemented the Chang'e lunar exploration program, the Tianwen Mars exploration mission, and independently built the Tiangong space station. In the field of information technology, China's 5G technology is leading the world, and emerging technologies such as artificial intelligence, big data, and cloud computing are flourishing. China has also greatly strengthened basic scientific research, achieving a series of major breakthroughs in fields such as quantum computing and life sciences. These achievements are inseparable from the country's high attention and continuous investment in scientific and technological innovation. In the future, China will continue to adhere to the innovation-driven development strategy and build a world-leading country in science and technology.

2023年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 乡村振兴战略是中国政府提出的一项重大国家战略，旨在推动农业农村现代化，实现乡村全面振兴。乡村振兴的总目标是实现农业农村现代化，让农业成为有奔头的产业，让农民成为有吸引力的职业，让农村成为安居乐业的美丽家园。乡村振兴包括产业振兴、人才振兴、文化振兴、生态振兴和组织振兴五个方面。各地因地制宜发展特色产业，如乡村旅游、特色农业和农村电商，增加了农民收入，改善了农村面貌。乡村振兴战略对于实现全体人民共同富裕具有重要的意义。
2023年6月第2套cet6.english: The rural revitalization strategy is a major national strategy proposed by the Chinese government, aimed at promoting the modernization of agriculture and rural areas and achieving comprehensive rural revitalization. The overall goal of rural revitalization is to realize the modernization of agriculture and rural areas, making agriculture a promising industry, farmers an attractive profession, and rural areas a beautiful home where people can live and work happily. Rural revitalization includes five aspects: industrial revitalization, talent revitalization, cultural revitalization, ecological revitalization and organizational revitalization. Localities have developed special industries according to local conditions, such as rural tourism, special agriculture and rural e-commerce, which have increased farmers' income and improved the appearance of rural areas. The rural revitalization strategy is of great significance for achieving common prosperity for all people.

2023年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 教育是民族振兴和社会进步的基石。中国政府高度重视教育事业的发展，始终坚持教育优先发展的战略地位。近年来，中国在教育领域取得了显著成就，全面普及了九年义务教育，高等教育毛入学率达到了60%以上。中国正在加快推进教育现代化，努力建设教育强国。教育现代化的核心是促进教育公平，提高教育质量，培养德智体美劳全面发展的社会主义建设者和接班人。中国还积极推动教育信息化，利用信息技术促进教育改革创新，让每个孩子都能享有公平而有质量的教育。
2023年6月第1套cet6.english: Education is the cornerstone of national revitalization and social progress. The Chinese government attaches great importance to the development of education and has always adhered to the strategic position of giving priority to education. In recent years, China has made remarkable achievements in the field of education, achieving universal access to nine-year compulsory education, with the gross enrollment rate of higher education reaching over 60%. China is accelerating the modernization of education and striving to build a strong educational country. The core of education modernization is to promote educational equity, improve the quality of education, and cultivate socialist builders and successors who are well-developed morally, intellectually, physically, aesthetically and labor-wise. China is also actively promoting the informatization of education, using information technology to promote educational reform and innovation, so that every child can enjoy fair and quality education.

2023年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 中国画是中国传统绘画艺术的主要形式，有着三千多年的历史。中国画主要使用毛笔、墨、颜料在宣纸或绢上创作，分为人物画、山水画和花鸟画三大类别。中国画强调"写意"，注重表现画家的主观情感和意境，而不是追求形似。水墨画是中国画的代表，以墨色的浓淡变化来表现物象。中国画与书法、诗词和印章密切相关，形成了独特的艺术体系。许多中国画作品上都配有题诗和印章，体现了诗书画印的完美结合。中国画在世界艺术领域中独树一帜，对东亚艺术产生了深远影响。
2023年12月第3套cet6.english: Chinese painting is the main form of traditional Chinese painting art, with a history of more than three thousand years. Chinese painting is mainly created using brushes, ink and pigments on rice paper or silk, and is divided into three major categories: figure painting, landscape painting and flower-and-bird painting. Chinese painting emphasizes "freehand brushwork", focusing on expressing the painter's subjective feelings and artistic conception rather than pursuing formal resemblance. Ink wash painting is representative of Chinese painting, using variations in the density of ink to depict objects. Chinese painting is closely related to calligraphy, poetry and seal engraving, forming a unique artistic system. Many Chinese paintings are accompanied by inscribed poems and seals, reflecting the perfect integration of poetry, calligraphy, painting and seal. Chinese painting is unique in the world art field and has had a profound influence on East Asian art.

2023年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 汉服是汉民族的传统服饰，具有悠久的历史和丰富的文化内涵。汉服的款式多样，主要有上衣下裳、深衣、襦裙等形制。汉服以其宽大的衣袖、交领右衽和系带固定为特点，体现了中国传统文化中的中庸、含蓄和典雅之美。近年来，随着中国传统文化的复兴，汉服运动在中国年轻人中逐渐兴起。越来越多的人开始穿着汉服参加传统节日、婚礼和日常活动。汉服不仅是一种服饰，更是中华民族文化认同的重要符号。汉服的流行反映了当代中国人对传统文化的热爱和文化自信的增强。
2023年12月第2套cet6.english: Hanfu is the traditional clothing of the Han ethnic group, with a long history and rich cultural connotations. Hanfu comes in various styles, mainly including the upper garment and lower skirt, the shenyi (one-piece robe), and the ruqun (jacket and skirt). Hanfu is characterized by its wide sleeves, crossed collar with the right side overlapping the left, and fastening with sash, reflecting the beauty of moderation, implicitness and elegance in traditional Chinese culture. In recent years, with the revival of traditional Chinese culture, the Hanfu movement has gradually emerged among young Chinese people. More and more people have started wearing Hanfu to participate in traditional festivals, weddings and daily activities. Hanfu is not only a kind of clothing, but also an important symbol of the cultural identity of the Chinese nation. The popularity of Hanfu reflects contemporary Chinese people's love for traditional culture and the enhancement of cultural confidence.

2023年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 中国是茶的故乡，茶文化在中国有着悠久的历史。中国人饮茶的历史可以追溯到上古时期，如今茶已经成为中国最普遍的饮品之一。中国茶种类繁多，主要有绿茶、红茶、乌龙茶、白茶、黄茶和黑茶六大类。不同的茶叶有不同的制作工艺和口感。茶不仅是一种饮品，更是一种文化的载体。茶道讲究"和、敬、清、寂"，体现了中国人的哲学思想和生活态度。以茶待客是中国的传统礼仪。如今，中国茶文化已经传播到世界各地，深受各国人民的喜爱。
2023年12月第1套cet6.english: China is the hometown of tea, and tea culture has a long history in China. The history of Chinese people drinking tea can be traced back to ancient times, and now tea has become one of the most popular beverages in China. There are many varieties of Chinese tea, mainly including six categories: green tea, black tea, oolong tea, white tea, yellow tea and dark tea. Different types of tea have different production processes and tastes. Tea is not only a beverage, but also a carrier of culture. The tea ceremony emphasizes "harmony, respect, purity and tranquility", reflecting the philosophical thoughts and life attitudes of Chinese people. Serving tea to guests is a traditional Chinese etiquette. Nowadays, Chinese tea culture has spread all over the world and is deeply loved by people from all over the world.

2022年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 大熊猫是中国的国宝，也是全球濒危物种保护的标志性物种。大熊猫主要生活在中国四川、陕西和甘肃的山区，以竹子为主食。为了保护大熊猫及其栖息地，中国政府建立了大熊猫国家公园，覆盖面积超过2.7万平方公里。大熊猫国家公园不仅保护了大熊猫的生存环境，也为其他珍稀动植物提供了庇护所。近年来，经过不懈努力，大熊猫的野外种群数量逐步增加，濒危等级从"濒危"降为"易危"。大熊猫国家公园的建设体现了中国在生物多样性保护和生态文明建设方面取得的成就。
2022年6月第3套cet6.english: The giant panda is a national treasure of China and an iconic species in global endangered species protection. Giant pandas mainly live in the mountainous areas of Sichuan, Shaanxi and Gansu provinces in China, and feed primarily on bamboo. To protect the giant panda and its habitat, the Chinese government has established the Giant Panda National Park, covering an area of over 27,000 square kilometers. The Giant Panda National Park not only protects the living environment of giant pandas, but also provides refuge for other rare animals and plants. In recent years, through unremitting efforts, the wild population of giant pandas has gradually increased, and the endangered status has been downgraded from "endangered" to "vulnerable". The construction of the Giant Panda National Park reflects China's achievements in biodiversity protection and ecological civilization construction.

2022年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 武夷山位于福建省西北部，是中国著名的风景名胜区和世界自然与文化双重遗产地。武夷山以其独特的丹霞地貌和丰富的生物多样性而闻名，被誉为"世界生物之窗"。武夷山还是中国乌龙茶和红茶的故乡，武夷岩茶大红袍享誉中外。2021年，武夷山成为中国的国家公园之一。作为国家公园，武夷山在保护自然生态系统的同时，也注重文化遗产的保护和传承。游客可以在这里欣赏自然美景，体验茶文化，感受人与自然和谐共生的美好。
2022年6月第2套cet6.english: Mount Wuyi is located in the northwestern part of Fujian Province, and is a famous scenic area and a UNESCO World Natural and Cultural Heritage Site. Mount Wuyi is known for its unique Danxia landforms and rich biodiversity, hailed as the "World Window of Biology". Mount Wuyi is also the hometown of Chinese oolong tea and black tea, and Wuyi rock tea Da Hong Pao is renowned both at home and abroad. In 2021, Mount Wuyi became one of China's national parks. As a national park, Mount Wuyi not only protects the natural ecosystem, but also attaches importance to the protection and inheritance of cultural heritage. Visitors can enjoy the natural beauty, experience tea culture, and appreciate the harmony between humans and nature here.

2022年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 三江源位于青海省南部，是长江、黄河和澜沧江的源头汇水区，被誉为"中华水塔"。三江源地区拥有丰富的野生动植物资源，生态系统独特而脆弱。为了保护这一重要的生态屏障，中国政府于2021年正式设立了三江源国家公园，这是中国第一个国家公园。国家公园的建立旨在加强对三江源生态系统的保护，维护水源涵养功能，保护生物多样性。三江源国家公园的建设是中国生态文明建设的重要举措，体现了人与自然和谐共生的理念。
2022年6月第1套cet6.english: Sanjiangyuan, located in the southern part of Qinghai Province, is the source catchment area of the Yangtze River, the Yellow River and the Lancang River, known as the "Water Tower of China". The Sanjiangyuan area has abundant wildlife resources, with a unique and fragile ecosystem. To protect this important ecological barrier, the Chinese government officially established Sanjiangyuan National Park in 2021, which is the first national park in China. The establishment of the national park aims to strengthen the protection of the Sanjiangyuan ecosystem, maintain water conservation functions, and protect biodiversity. The construction of Sanjiangyuan National Park is an important measure of China's ecological civilization construction, embodying the concept of harmonious coexistence between humans and nature.

2022年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 元宵节是中国传统节日之一，在农历正月十五庆祝，标志着春节庆祝活动的结束。元宵节的主要活动有赏花灯、猜灯谜、吃元宵等。元宵（或称汤圆）是一种用糯米粉制成的圆球形食品，有甜馅或咸馅，象征着团圆和幸福。元宵节期间，各地的灯会十分热闹，各式各样的花灯将夜晚装点得绚丽多彩。猜灯谜是元宵节的传统娱乐活动，人们将谜语写在花灯上，供人猜测。元宵节起源于汉代，至今已有两千多年的历史，是中国民间最热闹的节日之一。
2022年12月第3套cet6.english: The Lantern Festival is one of the traditional Chinese festivals, celebrated on the 15th day of the first lunar month, marking the end of the Spring Festival celebrations. The main activities of the Lantern Festival include viewing lanterns, solving lantern riddles, and eating yuanxiao. Yuanxiao (or tangyuan) is a round-shaped food made of glutinous rice flour, with sweet or savory fillings, symbolizing reunion and happiness. During the Lantern Festival, lantern shows are very lively everywhere, with various kinds of colorful lanterns decorating the night brilliantly. Solving lantern riddles is a traditional entertainment activity of the Lantern Festival, where riddles are written on lanterns for people to guess. The Lantern Festival originated in the Han Dynasty and has a history of more than two thousand years. It is one of the most lively folk festivals in China.

2022年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 中秋节是中国重要的传统节日之一，在农历八月十五日庆祝。中秋节起源于古代对月亮的崇拜，象征着团圆和丰收。中秋节最具代表性的食品是月饼，圆形的月饼象征着家庭的团圆和完整。中秋之夜，人们会与家人团聚，一起赏月、吃月饼、品尝桂花酒。在中国文化中，月亮承载着丰富的文化内涵，许多文人墨客写下了赞美月亮的诗篇。苏轼的"但愿人长久，千里共婵娟"就是表达中秋思念之情的千古名句。中秋节不仅是中国的传统节日，也是东亚和东南亚一些国家的重要节日。
2022年12月第2套cet6.english: The Mid-Autumn Festival is one of the important traditional festivals in China, celebrated on the 15th day of the eighth lunar month. The Mid-Autumn Festival originated from the ancient worship of the moon, symbolizing reunion and harvest. The most representative food of the Mid-Autumn Festival is mooncake, and the round shape of mooncakes symbolizes family reunion and completeness. On the night of the Mid-Autumn Festival, people gather with their families to admire the full moon, eat mooncakes, and taste osmanthus wine. In Chinese culture, the moon carries rich cultural connotations, and many literati have written poems praising the moon. Su Shi's line "May we all be blessed with longevity though far apart, we are still able to share the beauty of the moon together" is an eternal verse expressing longing on the Mid-Autumn Festival. The Mid-Autumn Festival is not only a traditional festival in China, but also an important festival in some East Asian and Southeast Asian countries.

2022年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 春节是中国最重要的传统节日，标志着农历新年的开始。春节的起源可以追溯到商代，距今已有四千多年的历史。春节期间，人们会进行各种庆祝活动，如贴春联、挂灯笼、放鞭炮、吃团圆饭和发红包等。春节是一个家人团聚的时刻，无论身在何处，人们都会尽量回家与家人共度佳节。除夕夜，全家人一起包饺子、看春晚，迎接新年的到来。春节不仅在中国盛行，在世界上许多有华人居住的地方也广泛庆祝。2024年12月，春节被列入联合国教科文组织非物质文化遗产名录。
2022年12月第1套cet6.english: The Spring Festival is the most important traditional festival in China, marking the beginning of the lunar new year. The origin of the Spring Festival can be traced back to the Shang Dynasty, with a history of more than 4,000 years. During the Spring Festival, people engage in various celebratory activities such as pasting Spring Festival couplets, hanging lanterns, setting off firecrackers, having reunion dinners, and giving red envelopes. The Spring Festival is a time for family reunion, and no matter where they are, people will try their best to return home to spend the holiday with their families. On New Year's Eve, the whole family makes dumplings together and watches the Spring Festival Gala to welcome the arrival of the new year. The Spring Festival is not only prevalent in China, but also widely celebrated in many places around the world where Chinese people live. In December 2024, the Spring Festival was inscribed on UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage List.

2021年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 青海湖位于青海省东北部，是中国最大的内陆咸水湖。湖面海拔约3200米，面积约4583平方公里。青海湖以其壮美的自然风光和丰富的生态资源而闻名。湖中有著名的鸟岛，每年春夏季节，成千上万的候鸟在此栖息繁殖，场面十分壮观。青海湖周围是广阔的草原和沙漠，景色多样。青海湖地区也是藏族、蒙古族等少数民族的聚居地，具有独特的民族文化和风情。近年来，青海省的生态环境保护工作不断加强，青海湖的水质和生态环境得到了有效改善。
2021年6月第3套cet6.english: Qinghai Lake is located in the northeastern part of Qinghai Province, and is the largest inland saltwater lake in China. The lake is at an altitude of about 3,200 meters, covering an area of about 4,583 square kilometers. Qinghai Lake is famous for its magnificent natural scenery and abundant ecological resources. There is a famous Bird Island in the lake, where tens of thousands of migratory birds inhabit and breed in spring and summer, creating a spectacular scene. Qinghai Lake is surrounded by vast grasslands and deserts, offering diverse landscapes. The Qinghai Lake area is also inhabited by ethnic groups such as Tibetans and Mongolians, with unique ethnic culture and customs. In recent years, ecological environmental protection in Qinghai Province has been continuously strengthened, and the water quality and ecological environment of Qinghai Lake have been effectively improved.

2021年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 云南位于中国西南部，是一个多民族聚居的省份，以其丰富的自然资源和独特的民族文化而闻名。云南拥有壮丽的自然风光，包括雪山、高原湖泊、热带雨林和喀斯特地貌。丽江古城、大理古城和西双版纳是著名的旅游目的地。云南还是中国生物多样性最丰富的地区之一，被誉为"动植物王国"。云南的普洱茶享誉国内外，是云南重要的经济作物之一。近年来，云南省大力发展旅游业和特色产业，促进了当地经济的快速发展和少数民族文化的保护传承。
2021年6月第2套cet6.english: Yunnan is located in southwestern China, a province inhabited by multiple ethnic groups, known for its rich natural resources and unique ethnic culture. Yunnan boasts magnificent natural scenery, including snow-capped mountains, plateau lakes, tropical rainforests and karst landforms. The ancient towns of Lijiang and Dali, as well as Xishuangbanna, are famous tourist destinations. Yunnan is also one of the regions with the richest biodiversity in China, known as the "Kingdom of Plants and Animals". Pu'er tea from Yunnan is well-known both at home and abroad, and is one of Yunnan's important cash crops. In recent years, Yunnan Province has vigorously developed tourism and special industries, promoting the rapid development of the local economy and the protection and inheritance of ethnic minority cultures.

2021年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 海南是中国第二大岛，位于中国最南端，拥有丰富的旅游资源和独特的热带风光。2020年，中国政府宣布将海南建设成为自由贸易港，实行更加开放的经济政策。海南自由贸易港的建设目标是打造成为中国新时代对外开放的重要门户。海南将在贸易、投资、金融和人才流动等方面实行更加便利化的政策，吸引全球企业前来投资兴业。海南还大力发展旅游业、现代服务业和高新技术产业。随着自由贸易港政策的逐步实施，海南正在成为世界瞩目的投资热土和旅游胜地。
2021年6月第1套cet6.english: Hainan is China's second largest island, located at the southernmost tip of China, with rich tourism resources and unique tropical scenery. In 2020, the Chinese government announced the construction of Hainan into a free trade port, implementing more open economic policies. The goal of building Hainan Free Trade Port is to make it an important gateway for China's opening up in the new era. Hainan will implement more convenient policies in trade, investment, finance and talent flow to attract global enterprises to invest and do business. Hainan is also vigorously developing tourism, modern service industries and high-tech industries. With the gradual implementation of the free trade port policies, Hainan is becoming an investment hot spot and tourist destination that attracts worldwide attention.

2021年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 辛亥革命爆发于1911年，是中国近代史上一次伟大的资产阶级民主革命。这场革命以孙中山为领袖，推翻了统治中国两千多年的封建君主专制制度，建立了中华民国。辛亥革命传播了民主共和的理念，极大地推动了中华民族的思想解放。虽然辛亥革命没有改变中国半殖民地半封建的社会性质，但它为中国社会的进步打开了闸门。辛亥革命的历史意义深远，它的精神和遗产至今仍然激励着中国人民为实现中华民族的伟大复兴而努力奋斗。
2021年12月第3套cet6.english: The Revolution of 1911 broke out in 1911 and was a great bourgeois democratic revolution in modern Chinese history. Led by Sun Yat-sen, this revolution overthrew the feudal autocratic monarchy system that had ruled China for more than two thousand years and established the Republic of China. The Revolution of 1911 spread the ideas of democracy and republic, greatly promoting the ideological emancipation of the Chinese nation. Although the Revolution of 1911 did not change China's semi-colonial and semi-feudal social nature, it opened the door for the progress of Chinese society. The historical significance of the Revolution of 1911 is far-reaching, and its spirit and legacy still inspire the Chinese people today to strive for the great rejuvenation of the Chinese nation.

2021年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 延安位于陕西省北部，是中国革命的圣地。1935年至1948年，延安是中共中央所在地，中国共产党在这里领导了抗日战争和解放战争，奠定了新中国的基石。延安时期形成了以实事求是、艰苦奋斗、为人民服务为核心的延安精神。延安拥有丰富的革命文化资源，包括杨家岭、枣园、宝塔山等革命旧址。如今，延安已经成为红色旅游和爱国主义教育的重要基地，每年吸引大量游客前来追寻红色足迹，了解中国共产党的光辉历史。
2021年12月第2套cet6.english: Yan'an is located in the northern part of Shaanxi Province, and is a sacred site of the Chinese revolution. From 1935 to 1948, Yan'an was the seat of the Central Committee of the Communist Party of China, where the CPC led the War of Resistance Against Japan and the War of Liberation, laying the foundation for the founding of New China. The Yan'an period gave birth to the Yan'an spirit, with its core being seeking truth from facts, hard struggle, and serving the people. Yan'an has rich revolutionary cultural resources, including revolutionary sites such as Yangjialing, Zaoyuan and Pagoda Mountain. Today, Yan'an has become an important base for red tourism and patriotic education, attracting a large number of tourists every year to follow the red footprints and learn about the glorious history of the Communist Party of China.

2021年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 井冈山位于江西省西南部，是中国革命的摇篮。1927年，毛泽东率领秋收起义部队来到井冈山，创建了第一个农村革命根据地。井冈山革命根据地的建立，为中国革命开辟了农村包围城市、武装夺取政权的正确道路。井冈山精神是中国革命精神的重要源头，其核心是坚定信念、艰苦奋斗、实事求是、敢闯新路。如今，井冈山已经成为红色旅游的重要目的地，每年吸引大量游客前来参观学习，缅怀革命先烈，接受革命传统教育。
2021年12月第1套cet6.english: Jinggangshan is located in the southwestern part of Jiangxi Province, and is the cradle of the Chinese revolution. In 1927, Mao Zedong led the troops of the Autumn Harvest Uprising to Jinggangshan and established the first rural revolutionary base. The establishment of the Jinggangshan revolutionary base opened up the correct path for the Chinese revolution of encircling the cities from the countryside and seizing state power by armed force. The Jinggangshan spirit is an important source of the Chinese revolutionary spirit, with its core being firm conviction, hard struggle, seeking truth from facts, and daring to blaze new trails. Today, Jinggangshan has become an important destination for red tourism, attracting a large number of tourists every year to visit and study, commemorate the revolutionary martyrs, and receive education on revolutionary traditions.

2020年9月第2套cet6.chinese: 《西游记》是中国古典四大名著之一，由明代小说家吴承恩创作。小说讲述了唐僧师徒四人——唐僧、孙悟空、猪八戒和沙僧——去西天取经的故事。他们在路上经历了九九八十一难，最终取得真经。小说中的孙悟空最为人们所喜爱，他机智勇敢、神通广大，会七十二变，能腾云驾雾。《西游记》融合了神话、寓言和讽刺元素，具有很高的文学价值。这部小说被翻译成多种语言，被改编成各种影视作品，在国内外都拥有广泛的读者和观众。
2020年9月第2套cet6.english: Journey to the West is one of the four great classical novels of Chinese literature, written by Wu Cheng'en, a novelist of the Ming Dynasty. The novel tells the story of the Tang monk and his three disciples — Sun Wukong, Zhu Bajie and Sha Wujing — who travel to the Western Heaven to obtain Buddhist scriptures. They encounter 81 tribulations on the journey and finally succeed in obtaining the true scriptures. Among the characters, Sun Wukong is the most beloved by people. He is intelligent, brave and extremely powerful, capable of 72 transformations and riding clouds. Journey to the West combines elements of mythology, fable and satire, and has high literary value. This novel has been translated into many languages and adapted into various film and television works, enjoying a wide readership and audience both at home and abroad.

2020年9月第1套cet6.chinese: 《红楼梦》是中国古典四大名著之一，由清代作家曹雪芹创作。小说以贾宝玉、林黛玉和薛宝钗的爱情悲剧为主线，描写了贾、史、王、薛四大家族的兴衰历程。《红楼梦》以其深刻的社会洞察力和精湛的艺术成就被誉为中国封建社会的百科全书。书中塑造了众多栩栩如生的人物形象，情节复杂而引人入胜。曹雪芹只完成了前80回，后40回一般认为是高鹗续写。这部小说被翻译成多种语言，在世界文学史上占有重要地位。
2020年9月第1套cet6.english: Dream of the Red Chamber is one of the four great classical novels of Chinese literature, written by Cao Xueqin, a writer of the Qing Dynasty. The novel takes the tragic love story of Jia Baoyu, Lin Daiyu and Xue Baochai as its main thread, describing the rise and fall of the four great families of Jia, Shi, Wang and Xue. Dream of the Red Chamber is acclaimed as an encyclopedia of Chinese feudal society for its profound social insight and superb artistic achievements. The book creates many lifelike characters and has a complex yet fascinating plot. Cao Xueqin only completed the first 80 chapters, and the last 40 chapters are generally believed to have been written by Gao E. This novel has been translated into many languages and occupies an important position in the history of world literature.

2020年7月第1套cet6.chinese: 《三国演义》是中国古典四大名著之一，由元末明初的小说家罗贯中创作。小说以东汉末年到西晋初年的历史为背景，描写了魏、蜀、吴三国之间的政治和军事斗争。书中塑造了众多鲜明的人物形象，如诸葛亮、关羽、曹操等，这些人物在中国家喻户晓。《三国演义》不仅在中国广受欢迎，在亚洲其他国家和地区也有很大影响。小说的许多故事和人物被改编成电影、电视剧和游戏。"三国"文化已经成为中国传统文化的重要组成部分，深刻地影响了中国人的价值观和思维方式。
2020年7月第1套cet6.english: The Romance of the Three Kingdoms is one of the four great classical novels of Chinese literature, written by Luo Guanzhong, a novelist of the late Yuan and early Ming dynasties. Set against the historical backdrop from the end of the Eastern Han Dynasty to the beginning of the Western Jin Dynasty, the novel depicts the political and military struggles among the three kingdoms of Wei, Shu and Wu. The book creates many vivid characters such as Zhuge Liang, Guan Yu and Cao Cao, who are household names in China. The Romance of the Three Kingdoms is not only widely popular in China, but also has great influence in other Asian countries and regions. Many stories and characters from the novel have been adapted into movies, TV dramas and games. The culture of the Three Kingdoms has become an important part of traditional Chinese culture, profoundly influencing Chinese people's values and ways of thinking.

2020年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 青藏铁路是世界上海拔最高、线路最长的高原铁路，全长1956公里。铁路从西宁出发，经过格尔木，最终到达拉萨。青藏铁路穿越青藏高原，大部分路段海拔在4000米以上，最高点唐古拉山口海拔5072米。铁路建设面临高原缺氧、冻土、生态保护等世界性难题。经过建设者的艰苦努力，青藏铁路于2006年7月全线建成通车。这条铁路极大地促进了西藏的经济发展和与内地的联系，被誉为"天路"。青藏铁路的建设也体现了中国在极端环境下进行大型工程建设的能力。
2020年12月第3套cet6.english: The Qinghai-Tibet Railway is the highest-altitude and longest plateau railway in the world, with a total length of 1,956 kilometers. Starting from Xining, the railway passes through Golmud and finally reaches Lhasa. The Qinghai-Tibet Railway traverses the Qinghai-Tibet Plateau, with most sections at an altitude of over 4,000 meters, and the highest point, the Tanggula Pass, at an altitude of 5,072 meters. The railway construction faced worldwide challenges such as high-altitude oxygen deficiency, permafrost, and ecological protection. Through the hard work of the builders, the Qinghai-Tibet Railway was fully completed and opened to traffic in July 2006. This railway has greatly promoted Tibet's economic development and its connection with the inland areas, and is hailed as the "Road to Heaven". The construction of the Qinghai-Tibet Railway also demonstrates China's ability to carry out large-scale engineering projects in extreme environments.

2020年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 港珠澳大桥是连接香港、珠海和澳门的跨海大桥，于2018年10月正式通车。大桥全长约55公里，是世界上最长的跨海大桥。港珠澳大桥是一座集桥、岛、隧于一体的工程奇迹，建设难度极大，历时九年才建成。大桥的建成极大地缩短了粤港澳大湾区之间的交通时间，促进了区域经济一体化。从香港到珠海的车程从过去的3个多小时缩短到约45分钟。港珠澳大桥不仅是一项重要的交通基础设施，也体现了中国在桥梁建设领域的先进技术和卓越能力。
2020年12月第2套cet6.english: The Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge is a sea-crossing bridge connecting Hong Kong, Zhuhai and Macao, which officially opened to traffic in October 2018. The bridge is about 55 kilometers long, making it the longest sea-crossing bridge in the world. The Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge is an engineering marvel integrating bridges, islands and tunnels in one. It was extremely difficult to construct and took nine years to complete. The completion of the bridge has greatly shortened the travel time within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area, promoting regional economic integration. The driving time from Hong Kong to Zhuhai has been reduced from more than three hours in the past to about 45 minutes. The Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge is not only an important transportation infrastructure, but also demonstrates China's advanced technology and exceptional capabilities in the field of bridge construction.

2020年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 北京大兴国际机场位于北京市南部，于2019年9月正式投入运营。该机场是世界上最大的单体航站楼建筑，占地面积约140万平方米。机场设计独特，外形像一只展翅的凤凰，寓意着吉祥和腾飞。大兴机场拥有先进的设施和智能化的管理系统，大大提高了旅客的出行体验。机场的建成不仅缓解了首都机场的运营压力，也为京津冀地区的协同发展提供了重要的交通支撑。预计到2025年，大兴机场的年旅客吞吐量将达到7200万人次，成为世界级航空枢纽。
2020年12月第1套cet6.english: Beijing Daxing International Airport, located in the southern part of Beijing, officially opened for operation in September 2019. The airport has the world's largest single-terminal building, covering an area of about 1.4 million square meters. The airport features a unique design, shaped like a phoenix spreading its wings, symbolizing good luck and soaring. Daxing Airport is equipped with advanced facilities and an intelligent management system, greatly improving the travel experience of passengers. The completion of the airport not only relieves the operational pressure on the Capital Airport, but also provides important transportation support for the coordinated development of the Beijing-Tianjin-Hebei region. It is estimated that by 2025, the annual passenger throughput of Daxing Airport will reach 72 million, making it a world-class aviation hub.

2019年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 舞狮是中国传统民间表演艺术之一，有着悠久的历史。在春节和其他重要节日，人们经常表演舞狮来庆祝，以驱邪避灾，祈求好运。舞狮通常由两名表演者合作完成，一人舞狮头，一人舞狮尾。狮子在中国文化中被视为吉祥的象征，舞狮表演动作灵活多变，富有戏剧性和观赏性。舞狮有南北两种主要风格，北狮注重技巧和武术动作，南狮则强调神似和丰富的表情。舞狮不仅在中国广受欢迎，而且在世界各地的华人社区中也非常盛行。
2019年6月第3套cet6.english: Lion dance is one of the traditional Chinese folk performing arts with a long history. During the Spring Festival and other important festivals, people often perform lion dances to celebrate, in order to ward off evil spirits and pray for good luck. The lion dance is usually performed by two performers working together, one handling the lion's head and the other handling the lion's tail. The lion is regarded as a symbol of good luck in Chinese culture. The movements of the lion dance are flexible and varied, full of drama and visual appeal. There are two main styles of lion dance: northern and southern. The northern style emphasizes skills and martial arts movements, while the southern style focuses on resemblance and rich expressions. Lion dance is not only popular in China, but also very prevalent in Chinese communities around the world.

2019年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 剪纸是中国民间艺术的一种独特形式，有着悠久的历史。剪纸通常用剪刀或刻刀在纸上剪刻出各种图案，用于装饰门窗、墙壁和灯笼等。剪纸的图案丰富多彩，包括人物、动物、花卉和汉字等，每一种图案都有其特定的寓意。例如，鱼代表年年有余，蝙蝠代表福气。剪纸在春节和婚礼等喜庆场合特别受欢迎，人们相信剪纸可以带来好运和幸福。2009年，中国剪纸被列入联合国教科文组织非物质文化遗产名录，成为世界文化的瑰宝。
2019年6月第2套cet6.english: Paper cutting is a unique form of Chinese folk art with a long history. Paper cutting usually involves cutting various patterns on paper with scissors or engraving knives, and is used to decorate doors, windows, walls and lanterns. The patterns of paper cutting are rich and colorful, including figures, animals, flowers and Chinese characters, each with its specific implied meaning. For example, fish represents abundance year after year, and bats represent good fortune. Paper cutting is particularly popular on festive occasions such as the Spring Festival and weddings, as people believe that paper cutting can bring good luck and happiness. In 2009, Chinese paper cutting was inscribed on UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage List, becoming a treasure of world culture.

2019年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 灯笼是中国传统文化中具有代表性的元素之一，有着悠久的历史。灯笼通常由竹子和纸或丝绸制成，内部放置蜡烛或灯泡。每逢春节、元宵节等传统节日，人们都会挂起红灯笼，营造喜庆祥和的氛围。灯笼不仅用于照明，更重要的是象征着团圆和吉祥。在中国，灯笼还有着丰富的文化内涵，代表着希望和光明。不同形状和颜色的灯笼有不同的寓意，红色的圆形灯笼最为常见。如今，灯笼已经成为中国文化的重要标志之一，在世界各地广受欢迎。
2019年6月第1套cet6.english: Lanterns are one of the representative elements of traditional Chinese culture, with a long history. Lanterns are usually made of bamboo and paper or silk, with candles or light bulbs placed inside. During traditional festivals such as the Spring Festival and the Lantern Festival, people hang up red lanterns to create a joyous and peaceful atmosphere. Lanterns are not only used for lighting, but more importantly, they symbolize reunion and good luck. In China, lanterns also have rich cultural connotations, representing hope and brightness. Different shapes and colors of lanterns have different implied meanings, and red round lanterns are the most common. Nowadays, lanterns have become one of the important symbols of Chinese culture and are widely popular around the world.

2019年12月第3套cet6.chinese: 荷花是中国传统的名花之一，以其出淤泥而不染的高洁品格而深受人们喜爱。荷花在中国文化中象征着纯洁、高雅和正直。荷花的根茎（莲藕）可供食用，莲子是一种营养丰富的食品。荷塘不仅是美丽的自然景观，也是许多动物和植物的栖息地。在中国古典文学中，荷花经常被用来比喻君子的高尚品德。周敦颐的《爱莲说》就是以荷花为主题的经典名篇。荷花在佛教文化中也具有重要地位，象征着清净和觉悟。
2019年12月第3套cet6.english: The lotus flower is one of the traditional famous flowers in China, deeply loved by people for its noble character of emerging unstained from the mud. In Chinese culture, the lotus symbolizes purity, elegance and integrity. The root of the lotus (lotus root) is edible, and lotus seeds are a nutritious food. Lotus ponds are not only beautiful natural landscapes, but also habitats for many animals and plants. In Chinese classical literature, the lotus is often used as a metaphor for the noble character of a gentleman. Zhou Dunyi's "On the Love of the Lotus" is a classic masterpiece with the lotus as its theme. The lotus also occupies an important position in Buddhist culture, symbolizing purity and enlightenment.

2019年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 梅花是中国传统的名花之一，因其在严寒的冬季傲然绽放而备受推崇。梅花象征着坚韧不拔、自强不息的精神品质，在中国文化中有着特殊的地位。自古以来，无数诗人画家以梅花为主题创作了不朽的作品。梅花与松、竹并称为"岁寒三友"，寓意着在困境中保持高尚品格。梅花通常在冬末春初开放，花色以红色、粉色和白色为主，香气淡雅。梅花被许多城市选为市花，也是中国传统文化的重要象征之一。
2019年12月第2套cet6.english: Plum blossom is one of the traditional famous flowers in China, highly admired for its proud blooming in the severe cold of winter. The plum blossom symbolizes the spiritual qualities of perseverance and self-improvement, and holds a special place in Chinese culture. Since ancient times, countless poets and painters have created immortal works with plum blossoms as their theme. Plum blossoms, together with pines and bamboos, are known as the "Three Friends of Winter", implying the maintenance of noble character in difficult circumstances. Plum blossoms usually bloom in late winter and early spring, with red, pink and white as the main colors, and have a delicate fragrance. Plum blossoms have been chosen as the city flower by many cities, and are also one of the important symbols of traditional Chinese culture.

2019年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 牡丹是中国传统的名花，被誉为"花中之王"，象征着富贵和繁荣。牡丹花朵硕大，色彩艳丽，姿态优美，深受中国人民的喜爱。在中国传统文化中，牡丹经常出现在绘画、诗词、服饰和工艺品中，代表着美好和吉祥。牡丹的栽培历史悠久，洛阳和菏泽以种植牡丹闻名，每年春天都举办牡丹花会，吸引大量游客。牡丹不仅在中国备受推崇，也在世界园艺中占有重要地位，被誉为"中国花卉的代表"。
2019年12月第1套cet6.english: Peony is a traditional famous flower in China, hailed as the "king of flowers", symbolizing wealth and prosperity. With large blossoms, brilliant colors and elegant postures, peonies are deeply loved by the Chinese people. In traditional Chinese culture, peonies often appear in paintings, poems, costumes and crafts, representing beauty and good fortune. Peony cultivation has a long history. Luoyang and Heze are famous for growing peonies, and they hold peony festivals every spring, attracting a large number of tourists. Peonies are not only highly esteemed in China, but also occupy an important position in world horticulture, and are known as "the representative of Chinese flowers".

2018年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 随着环境污染和能源危机的加剧，中国政府大力支持新能源汽车的发展。新能源汽车包括纯电动汽车、混合动力汽车和燃料电池汽车等。与传统燃油汽车相比，新能源汽车具有节能环保的优点，可以显著减少尾气排放。政府出台了一系列优惠政策，如购车补贴、免征购置税和免费牌照等，鼓励消费者购买新能源汽车。许多城市还建设了大量的充电桩，为电动汽车提供便利的充电服务。新能源汽车产业已经成为中国战略性新兴产业的重要组成部分。
2018年6月第3套cet6.english: With the intensification of environmental pollution and the energy crisis, the Chinese government has strongly supported the development of new energy vehicles. New energy vehicles include pure electric vehicles, hybrid electric vehicles, and fuel cell vehicles, among others. Compared with traditional fuel vehicles, new energy vehicles have the advantages of energy saving and environmental protection, and can significantly reduce exhaust emissions. The government has introduced a series of preferential policies, such as purchase subsidies, exemption from purchase tax, and free license plates, to encourage consumers to buy new energy vehicles. Many cities have also built a large number of charging stations to provide convenient charging services for electric vehicles. The new energy vehicle industry has become an important part of China's strategic emerging industries.

2018年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 中国高铁是世界上规模最大的高速铁路网络，总里程超过4万公里，位居世界第一。中国高铁技术先进，运营时速可达350公里，安全可靠，准点率高。高铁极大地缩短了城市之间的时空距离，促进了区域经济发展和人员往来。从北京到上海，高铁只需约4.5小时，而过去普通列车需要12个小时以上。高铁不仅改变了中国人的出行方式，也为世界铁路发展提供了中国方案和中国智慧。中国高铁正在走向世界，成为中国制造的一张亮丽名片。
2018年6月第2套cet6.english: China's high-speed railway is the largest high-speed rail network in the world, with a total mileage of over 40,000 kilometers, ranking first in the world. China's high-speed railway features advanced technology, an operating speed of up to 350 kilometers per hour, safety and reliability, and a high on-time rate. The high-speed railway has greatly shortened the temporal and spatial distance between cities, promoting regional economic development and personnel exchanges. From Beijing to Shanghai, the high-speed train takes only about 4.5 hours, while in the past ordinary trains took more than 12 hours. The high-speed railway has not only changed the way Chinese people travel, but also provided Chinese solutions and Chinese wisdom for the development of railways worldwide. China's high-speed railway is going global and has become a shining name card of Chinese manufacturing.

2018年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 近年来，越来越多的中国城市开始推广公共自行车系统。公共自行车是一种环保的出行方式，可以有效缓解城市交通拥堵和空气污染问题。用户可以通过手机应用程序方便地租借和归还自行车。公共自行车站点通常设置在地铁站、公交站和居民区附近，方便市民换乘。这种出行方式不仅经济实惠，而且有益健康。许多城市还推出了无桩共享单车，进一步方便了人们的出行。公共自行车系统已经成为中国城市公共交通的重要组成部分。
2018年6月第1套cet6.english: In recent years, more and more Chinese cities have begun to promote public bicycle systems. Public bicycles are an environmentally friendly mode of transportation that can effectively alleviate urban traffic congestion and air pollution. Users can conveniently rent and return bicycles through mobile phone applications. Public bicycle stations are usually set up near subway stations, bus stops and residential areas to facilitate people's transfers. This mode of transportation is not only economical but also beneficial to health. Many cities have also introduced dockless shared bicycles, further facilitating people's travel. The public bicycle system has become an important part of urban public transportation in China.

2018年12月第3套cet6.chinese: "中国制造"已经遍布全球，从服装鞋帽到电子产品，中国制造的产品以其价格优势和质量提升赢得了国际市场的认可。然而，过去"中国制造"常常被视为廉价商品的代名词。为了改变这一形象，中国政府提出了"中国制造2025"计划，旨在推动制造业向高端化、智能化和绿色化发展。越来越多的中国企业重视科技创新和品牌建设，提升产品质量和附加值。如今，中国正在从"制造大国"向"制造强国"转变，高铁、5G通信、无人机等高端制造领域已经走在世界前列。
2018年12月第3套cet6.english: "Made in China" can be found all over the world. From clothing and shoes to electronic products, products made in China have won recognition in the international market with their price advantages and quality improvements. However, in the past, "Made in China" was often regarded as a synonym for cheap goods. To change this image, the Chinese government proposed the "Made in China 2025" plan, aiming to promote the development of the manufacturing industry toward high-end, intelligent, and green production. More and more Chinese enterprises are attaching importance to technological innovation and brand building, improving product quality and added value. Nowadays, China is transforming from a "big manufacturing country" to a "powerful manufacturing country", and high-end manufacturing fields such as high-speed railways, 5G communications, and drones are already at the forefront of the world.

2018年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 共享经济是一种基于资源共享的新型经济模式，在中国发展十分迅速。共享单车、共享汽车、共享充电宝等共享经济模式已经深入到人们的日常生活中。共享经济通过互联网平台将闲置资源与需求方进行匹配，提高了资源的利用效率。共享单车尤其受欢迎，用户可以通过手机扫码随时租用和归还自行车，解决了城市出行"最后一公里"的问题。然而，共享经济也面临着一些挑战，如管理不规范、过度投放等问题。政府正在加强监管，引导共享经济健康发展。
2018年12月第2套cet6.english: The sharing economy is a new economic model based on resource sharing, which has developed very rapidly in China. Sharing economy models such as shared bicycles, shared cars, and shared power banks have penetrated into people's daily lives. The sharing economy matches idle resources with demanders through internet platforms, improving the efficiency of resource utilization. Shared bicycles are particularly popular. Users can rent and return bicycles anytime by scanning QR codes with their mobile phones, solving the "last mile" problem of urban travel. However, the sharing economy also faces some challenges, such as irregular management and excessive deployment. The government is strengthening supervision to guide the healthy development of the sharing economy.

2018年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 近年来，手机支付在中国迅速发展，已经成为人们日常生活中不可或缺的支付方式。无论是在大型商场还是在街边小摊，人们都可以通过扫描二维码轻松完成支付。手机支付不仅方便快捷，而且安全可靠。用户只需要携带手机，无需携带现金和银行卡。支付宝和微信支付是中国最流行的两种手机支付工具，拥有数亿用户。手机支付的普及极大地推动了电子商务和数字经济的发展，使中国成为全球移动支付领域的领先者。
2018年12月第1套cet6.english: In recent years, mobile payment has developed rapidly in China and has become an indispensable payment method in people's daily lives. Whether in large shopping malls or at street stalls, people can easily complete payments by scanning QR codes. Mobile payment is not only convenient and fast, but also safe and reliable. Users only need to carry their mobile phones, without needing to carry cash or bank cards. Alipay and WeChat Pay are the two most popular mobile payment tools in China, with hundreds of millions of users. The popularity of mobile payment has greatly promoted the development of e-commerce and the digital economy, making China a global leader in the field of mobile payment.

2017年6月第3套cet6.chinese: 珠江是中国第三大河流，全长约2320公里，流域面积约45万平方公里。珠江流经云南、贵州、广西和广东等省区，最后注入南海。珠江三角洲是中国经济最活跃的地区之一，包括广州、深圳、珠海等重要城市。珠江水资源丰富，航运便利，对中国南方的农业、工业和城市发展起到了重要的支撑作用。珠三角地区以其制造业和出口贸易闻名于世，被誉为"世界工厂"。近年来，当地政府致力于珠江流域的生态保护和环境治理，努力实现可持续发展。
2017年6月第3套cet6.english: The Pearl River is the third largest river in China, with a total length of about 2,320 kilometers and a drainage area of about 450,000 square kilometers. The Pearl River flows through Yunnan, Guizhou, Guangxi and Guangdong provinces and regions, and finally empties into the South China Sea. The Pearl River Delta is one of the most economically dynamic regions in China, including important cities such as Guangzhou, Shenzhen and Zhuhai. With abundant water resources and convenient shipping, the Pearl River plays an important supporting role in agriculture, industry and urban development in southern China. The Pearl River Delta region is famous worldwide for its manufacturing industry and export trade, and is known as the "workshop of the world". In recent years, local governments have been committed to ecological protection and environmental management of the Pearl River basin, striving to achieve sustainable development.

2017年6月第2套cet6.chinese: 长江是亚洲最长的河流，也是世界第三长河，全长约6300公里。长江流经中国多个省份，流域面积广泛，是中国重要的水资源和水运通道。长江三角洲是中国经济最发达的地区之一，许多重要城市如上海、南京和武汉都位于长江沿岸。长江三峡大坝是世界上最大的水电站之一，为中国的经济发展提供了大量的电力。然而，长江也面临着环境污染和生态破坏的挑战，中国政府正在采取各种措施来保护长江的生态环境。
2017年6月第2套cet6.english: The Yangtze River is the longest river in Asia and the third longest river in the world, with a total length of about 6,300 kilometers. The Yangtze River flows through many provinces in China, covering a vast drainage area, and serves as an important water resource and waterway for China. The Yangtze River Delta is one of the most economically developed regions in China, and many important cities such as Shanghai, Nanjing and Wuhan are located along the Yangtze River. The Three Gorges Dam on the Yangtze River is one of the largest hydropower stations in the world, providing a huge amount of electricity for China's economic development. However, the Yangtze River also faces challenges of environmental pollution and ecological damage, and the Chinese government is taking various measures to protect the ecological environment of the Yangtze River.

2017年6月第1套cet6.chinese: 黄河是亚洲第三长河，也是世界上最长的河流之一，全长约5464公里。黄河流域是中华文明的发源地之一，被誉为中国的"母亲河"。黄河因其携带大量泥沙而得名，河水呈现黄色。黄河经常发生洪水，给沿岸人民带来巨大的灾难；但同时也为农业提供了肥沃的土壤，使得沿岸地区成为中国重要的农业基地。近年来，中国政府加大了对黄河治理的投入，实施了一系列生态保护措施，有效地改善了黄河的生态环境。
2017年6月第1套cet6.english: The Yellow River is the third longest river in Asia and one of the longest rivers in the world, with a total length of about 5,464 kilometers. The Yellow River basin is one of the cradles of Chinese civilization and is hailed as the "mother river" of China. The Yellow River got its name from the large amount of sediment it carries, which gives the river water a yellowish color. The Yellow River frequently floods, bringing great disasters to the people living along its banks, but it also provides fertile soil for agriculture, making the areas along the river important agricultural bases in China. In recent years, the Chinese government has increased investment in the management of the Yellow River and implemented a series of ecological protection measures, effectively improving the ecological environment of the Yellow River.

2017年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 泰山位于山东省中部，是中国五岳之首，被誉为"天下第一山"。泰山以其雄伟壮观的自然景观和深厚的文化内涵而闻名。自古以来，泰山就是帝王祭祀天地的地方，历代皇帝在此举行封禅大典。泰山上有许多历史遗迹和文物，如岱庙、碑刻和摩崖石刻等。泰山的日出是著名的自然奇观，每年吸引大量游客登山观日出。1987年，泰山被联合国教科文组织列为世界自然与文化双重遗产。
2017年12月第2套cet6.english: Located in the central part of Shandong Province, Mount Tai is the head of the Five Great Mountains in China and is hailed as "the most revered mountain under heaven". Mount Tai is famous for its magnificent natural landscapes and profound cultural connotations. Since ancient times, Mount Tai has been a place where emperors offered sacrifices to heaven and earth, and emperors of successive dynasties held grand ceremonies of offering sacrifices here. There are many historical relics and cultural artifacts on Mount Tai, such as the Dai Temple, inscriptions, and cliff carvings. The sunrise on Mount Tai is a famous natural wonder, attracting large numbers of tourists every year to climb the mountain to watch the sunrise. In 1987, Mount Tai was listed by UNESCO as a World Natural and Cultural Heritage Site.

2017年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 黄山位于安徽省南部，以其独特的自然景观闻名于世，被誉为"天下第一奇山"。黄山以奇松、怪石、云海、温泉"四绝"著称。黄山四季景色各异，春天百花盛开，夏天绿树成荫，秋天红叶满山，冬天白雪皑皑。黄山不仅自然风光秀丽，而且文化底蕴深厚，历史上许多文人墨客在此留下了大量的诗篇和画作。1990年，黄山被联合国教科文组织列为世界自然与文化双重遗产，吸引了来自世界各地的游客。
2017年12月第1套cet6.english: Located in the southern part of Anhui Province, Mount Huangshan is world-famous for its unique natural landscapes and is hailed as "the most fantastic mountain under heaven". Mount Huangshan is renowned for its "four wonders": fantastic pines, grotesque rocks, sea of clouds and hot springs. Mount Huangshan offers different scenery in different seasons: flowers blossom everywhere in spring, trees provide shade in summer, red leaves cover the mountains in autumn, and white snow blankets everything in winter. Mount Huangshan not only boasts beautiful natural scenery, but also has profound cultural heritage. Throughout history, many literati have left numerous poems and paintings here. In 1990, Mount Huangshan was listed by UNESCO as a World Natural and Cultural Heritage Site, attracting tourists from all over the world.

2016年12月第2套cet6.chinese: 在中国传统文化中，白色具有多重含义。一方面，白色象征着纯洁和高雅，如"白衣天使"用来称呼医护人员。另一方面，白色在丧事中被广泛使用，代表着哀悼和悲伤。与西方文化不同，在中国婚礼上，新娘通常不穿白色婚纱，而是穿红色的衣服，因为红色象征喜庆。在戏曲中，白色的脸谱通常代表奸诈的人物。然而，随着全球化的发展，越来越多的中国年轻人开始在婚礼上穿白色婚纱，接受西方婚礼的传统。
2016年12月第2套cet6.english: In traditional Chinese culture, white has multiple meanings. On the one hand, white symbolizes purity and elegance, as in the term "angels in white" which is used to refer to medical workers. On the other hand, white is widely used in funerals, representing mourning and grief. Unlike in Western culture, brides in Chinese weddings usually do not wear white wedding dresses; instead they wear red clothes, because red symbolizes happiness. In Chinese opera, white facial makeup usually represents treacherous characters. However, with the development of globalization, more and more young Chinese people are wearing white wedding dresses at their weddings and embracing Western wedding traditions.

2016年12月第1套cet6.chinese: 在中国文化中，红色通常象征着吉祥、幸福和繁荣。红色在春节和其他喜庆场合被广泛使用。人们会贴红对联，挂红灯笼，发红包。红色在中国婚礼中也扮演着重要角色，新娘通常穿着红色的婚纱。在传统观念中，红色可以驱邪避灾，给人们带来好运。此外，红色也是中国国旗的主色调，象征着革命和进步。如今，红色已经成为了中国文化中不可或缺的一部分，深深融入了人们的日常生活。
2016年12月第1套cet6.english: In Chinese culture, red usually symbolizes good luck, happiness and prosperity. Red is widely used during the Spring Festival and other festive occasions. People paste red couplets, hang red lanterns, and give red envelopes. Red also plays an important role in Chinese weddings, where brides typically wear red wedding dresses. According to traditional beliefs, red can ward off evil spirits and bring good fortune to people. In addition, red is the dominant color of the Chinese national flag, symbolizing revolution and progress. Nowadays, red has become an indispensable part of Chinese culture, deeply integrated into people's daily lives.

2023年6月第1套cet4.chinese: 近年来，中国城市化进程不断加快。越来越多的人从农村迁往城市，城市的规模也在不断扩大。城市化给人们带来了更好的生活条件和更多的工作机会。同时，城市化也带来了一些挑战，比如交通拥堵和环境污染。政府正在采取措施解决这些问题，努力建设更加宜居的城市。
2023年6月第1套cet4.english: In recent years, China's urbanization process has been accelerating. More and more people are moving from rural areas to cities, and the scale of cities is constantly expanding. Urbanization has brought people better living conditions and more job opportunities. At the same time, urbanization also brings some challenges, such as traffic congestion and environmental pollution. The government is taking measures to solve these problems and striving to build more livable cities.

2023年6月第2套cet4.chinese: 中国的基础设施建设取得了巨大成就。高速铁路网覆盖了全国大部分地区，使人们的出行变得更加便捷。新的机场和港口不断建成，促进了国际贸易的发展。此外，5G网络和数字基础设施的建设也走在了世界前列。这些成就不仅改善了中国人的生活，也为经济发展提供了强有力的支撑。
2023年6月第2套cet4.english: China has made great achievements in infrastructure construction. The high-speed railway network covers most parts of the country, making people's travel more convenient. New airports and ports are constantly being built, promoting the development of international trade. In addition, the construction of 5G networks and digital infrastructure is also leading the world. These achievements have not only improved the lives of Chinese people, but also provided strong support for economic development.

2023年6月第3套cet4.chinese: 中国的养老保障体系正在不断完善。随着人口老龄化问题的加剧，政府加大了对养老服务的投入。越来越多的老年人能够享受到基本养老金和医疗保障。各地还建立了社区养老服务中心，为老年人提供日间照料和娱乐活动。这些措施有效提高了老年人的生活质量。
2023年6月第3套cet4.english: China's old-age security system is being continuously improved. With the intensification of the aging population problem, the government has increased its investment in elderly care services. More and more elderly people are able to enjoy basic pensions and medical insurance. Community elderly care service centers have also been established in various places, providing daytime care and recreational activities for the elderly. These measures have effectively improved the quality of life for the elderly.

2023年12月第1套cet4.chinese: 改革开放是中国现代化进程中的重要里程碑。自1978年以来，中国经济取得了举世瞩目的成就。改革推动了市场经济的发展，开放促进了国际贸易和投资。中国人民的生活水平显著提高，贫困人口大幅减少。改革开放不仅改变了中国，也深刻影响了世界。
2023年12月第1套cet4.english: Reform and opening-up is an important milestone in China's modernization process. Since 1978, China's economy has achieved remarkable accomplishments that have attracted worldwide attention. Reform has promoted the development of the market economy, while opening-up has facilitated international trade and investment. The living standards of the Chinese people have significantly improved, and the number of people in poverty has greatly decreased. Reform and opening-up has not only changed China but also profoundly influenced the world.

2023年12月第2套cet4.chinese: 中国已经全面建成小康社会，这是中华民族发展史上的一个重要里程碑。在过去几十年里，数亿人口摆脱了贫困，人民生活水平显著提高。城乡居民收入持续增长，社会保障体系更加健全。教育、医疗、住房等民生问题得到有效改善。全面建设小康社会的目标已经实现。
2023年12月第2套cet4.english: China has completed the building of a moderately prosperous society in all respects, which is an important milestone in the development history of the Chinese nation. Over the past few decades, hundreds of millions of people have been lifted out of poverty, and people's living standards have significantly improved. The income of urban and rural residents has continued to grow, and the social security system has become more complete. Livelihood issues such as education, healthcare, and housing have been effectively improved. The goal of building a moderately prosperous society in all respects has been achieved.

2023年12月第3套cet4.chinese: 中国高度重视教育事业的发展。国家对教育的投入逐年增加，教育公平不断推进。九年义务教育全面普及，高等教育毛入学率持续提高。职业教育也得到快速发展，为各行各业培养了大量的技术人才。教育事业的发展为国家现代化建设提供了强有力的人才支撑和智力支持。
2023年12月第3套cet4.english: China attaches great importance to the development of education. The state's investment in education has increased year by year, and educational equity has been continuously promoted. Nine-year compulsory education has been fully popularized, and the gross enrollment rate of higher education has continued to rise. Vocational education has also developed rapidly, cultivating a large number of technical talents for various industries. The development of education has provided strong talent support and intellectual support for the country's modernization.

2024年6月第1套cet4.chinese: 人工智能技术在中国得到了广泛应用。从智能手机到智能家居，从自动驾驶到医疗诊断，AI正在改变人们的生活方式。许多中国企业正在积极研发AI技术，推动产业升级。同时，政府也制定了相关政策，规范AI的发展和应用。人工智能正在成为推动中国经济发展的重要力量。
2024年6月第1套cet4.english: Artificial intelligence technology has been widely applied in China. From smartphones to smart homes, from autonomous driving to medical diagnosis, AI is changing people's lifestyles. Many Chinese companies are actively developing AI technologies to promote industrial upgrading. At the same time, the government has also formulated relevant policies to regulate the development and application of AI. Artificial intelligence is becoming an important force driving China's economic development.

2024年6月第2套cet4.chinese: 中国的数字经济正在快速发展。电子商务、移动支付、在线教育等数字产业蓬勃发展，深刻改变了人们的生活和消费方式。数字经济已经成为中国经济增长的新引擎。越来越多传统企业开始数字化转型，提高了生产效率和竞争力。中国政府积极推动数字经济发展，为创新型企业创造了良好的政策环境。
2024年6月第2套cet4.english: China's digital economy is developing rapidly. Digital industries such as e-commerce, mobile payment, and online education are flourishing, profoundly changing people's lifestyles and consumption patterns. The digital economy has become a new engine for China's economic growth. More and more traditional enterprises are starting digital transformation, improving production efficiency and competitiveness. The Chinese government actively promotes the development of the digital economy, creating a favorable policy environment for innovative enterprises.

2024年6月第3套cet4.chinese: 中国在科技创新方面取得了显著成就。在航天领域，中国的载人航天工程和月球探测项目不断取得新突破。在通信技术领域，5G技术的研发和应用处于世界领先地位。在新能源领域，中国已经成为全球最大的新能源汽车市场。科技创新不仅推动了经济发展，也改善了人民的生活质量。
2024年6月第3套cet4.english: China has made remarkable achievements in scientific and technological innovation. In the space field, China's manned space program and lunar exploration projects continue to make new breakthroughs. In the field of communication technology, the research and application of 5G technology are at the world's leading level. In the field of new energy, China has become the world's largest market for new energy vehicles. Scientific and technological innovation has not only promoted economic development but also improved people's quality of life.
